杂多圈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8N6RIyKpXYfFVuEUQ/37lkz8Xd9eH4dw8w0AEkhfZMl","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e244776fe0942b48f6589590a835dc8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794523&x-signature=5KqKeEoPpZzDIKN9HFUJxZykL%2BY%3D","user_id":"2615101999286506","user_name":"世界毁灭得了"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2615101999286506","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7592219877310483481","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+直播+国运+无女主】
神秘诡异降临！整个世界被诡异的力量所支配！
龙国天选者连败七场，已达灭国边缘！
作为普通老实的大学生陈云竟被选中为天选者。
众人看着吊儿郎当十分不靠谱的陈云思绪复杂。
而在看到此次副本竟是几乎无法通关S级怪谈时，众人内心彻底绝望。
本来十分紧张恐惧的陈云在穿越到怪谈世界后却立刻傻了眼。
我变成了杰瑞？！
汤姆？斯派克？两只鞋太太……
熟悉的一幕幕将他的童年记忆拖拽了起来。
不是，你早说啊！
作为祖国的花朵，猫和老鼠他早已背的滚瓜烂熟。
闭着眼睛都能说出任意剧情。
开局扮演杰瑞，戏耍汤姆，调戏两只鞋太太，痛打斯派克。
在其他选手还在为了生存绞尽脑汁躲避危险时。
陈云早已开启了幸福的生活。
来，汤姆给我拿瓶牛奶！
斯派克过来给我捏捏肩！
全球观众看到后都十分不可置信：“你来这旅游来了！？”
谁料陈云非得不收敛反而更加猖狂。
“别人唯唯诺诺当小狗，我陈云就要风风光光横着走！”
……
在目睹陈云如同旅游般通关一个个怪谈副本，其他国家彻底坐不住了。
“这不是挂？！！”
“大佬求带！！”
而怪谈界的诡异们每当听到陈云这个名字都会惊慌失措。
“快跑！他又来旅游了！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2cffea73a0a8d76edec81ac32b9987ce","author":"落下银幕","author_id":"","book_id":"7592219877310483481","book_name":"规则怪谈：从诡异汤姆开始","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7592220354156691993","read_count":"13866","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"266762"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.6","serial_count":"130","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,穿越,二次元,规则怪谈,国运,无女主,副本,大佬","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e4483dd2989ba4d212c59c8200162c7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779450346&x-signature=a1KllrrO%2F5QXoEcl4JYvna2AeL8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_inf
